Sections.Name: Unit Cost Calculator
Sections.Description: Change any value and the others update automatically

MetaTemplates.Template:
Multi-Input Change Tracking

This example demonstrates a multi-input evaluate change pattern where solvers detect which of two tracked inputs changed and recompute the other accordingly. Changing Quantity always recomputes Dollar Amount.

[ solve ] [ debug ]

Solvers.Expression: DollarAmount = IF(CostPerUnit_Changed + DollarAmount_Changed, "==", 0, Quantity * CostPerUnit, DollarAmount)

Sections.Name: Line Items (Tabular)
Sections.Description: Same change tracking pattern applied per row in a tabular group

Groups.Name: Line Items
RecordSetSolvers: DollarAmount = IF(CostPerUnit_Changed + DollarAmount_Changed, "==", 0, Quantity * CostPerUnit, DollarAmount)

MetaTemplates.Template:
Multi-Input Evaluate Change Pattern

This pattern uses a 6-phase solver chain to detect which of two tracked inputs changed and recompute the other. Quantity is a simple driver — changing it always recomputes DollarAmount. CostPerUnit and DollarAmount are the tracked pair — changing one updates the other.

Phase Overview

OrdinalPhaseDescription
5InitSeed _LastSolve cache from current input on first solve (when cache is 0).
10CacheSnapshot current CostPerUnit and DollarAmount into _Hidden fields.
15ResetClear all _Changed flags to 0.
20DetectCompare _Hidden vs _LastSolve — if different, set _Changed = 1.
25RecomputeIf CostPerUnit changed → recompute DollarAmount. If DollarAmount changed → recompute CostPerUnit. If neither changed (Quantity edited) → recompute DollarAmount.
30UpdateCopy final values to _LastSolve for next cycle (uses post-recompute values, not _Hidden snapshots).

Note on Operators

The IF() function does not support !=. To detect “not equal,” we use IF(a, "==", b, 0, 1) — swapping the true/false outputs.

JSON Solver Definitions (Section Solvers)

These are the solver objects used in the UnitCost section with explicit ordinals:

[
  { "Expression": "CostPerUnit_LastSolve = IF(CostPerUnit_LastSolve, \"==\", 0, CostPerUnit, CostPerUnit_LastSolve)", "Ordinal": 5 },
  { "Expression": "DollarAmount_LastSolve = IF(DollarAmount_LastSolve, \"==\", 0, DollarAmount, DollarAmount_LastSolve)", "Ordinal": 5 },
  { "Expression": "CostPerUnit_Hidden = CostPerUnit", "Ordinal": 10 },
  { "Expression": "DollarAmount_Hidden = DollarAmount", "Ordinal": 10 },
  { "Expression": "CostPerUnit_Changed = 0", "Ordinal": 15 },
  { "Expression": "DollarAmount_Changed = 0", "Ordinal": 15 },
  { "Expression": "CostPerUnit_Changed = IF(CostPerUnit_Hidden, \"==\", CostPerUnit_LastSolve, 0, 1)", "Ordinal": 20 },
  { "Expression": "DollarAmount_Changed = IF(DollarAmount_Hidden, \"==\", DollarAmount_LastSolve, 0, 1)", "Ordinal": 20 },
  { "Expression": "DollarAmount = IF(CostPerUnit_Changed, \"==\", 1, CostPerUnit * Quantity, DollarAmount)", "Ordinal": 25 },
  { "Expression": "CostPerUnit = IF(DollarAmount_Changed, \"==\", 1, DollarAmount / Quantity, CostPerUnit)", "Ordinal": 25 },
  { "Expression": "DollarAmount = IF(CostPerUnit_Changed + DollarAmount_Changed, \"==\", 0, Quantity * CostPerUnit, DollarAmount)", "Ordinal": 25 },
  { "Expression": "CostPerUnit_LastSolve = CostPerUnit", "Ordinal": 30 },
  { "Expression": "DollarAmount_LastSolve = DollarAmount", "Ordinal": 30 }
]

CSV Solver Definitions

The equivalent hidden descriptor rows and solver expressions in CSV format. Only the relevant columns are shown; all other columns are empty.

Form,DataOnly,Section Hash,Input Address,Input Hash,DataType,InputType,Equation,Equation Ordinal

ChangeTracking,1,UnitCost,UnitCost.CostPerUnit_Hidden,CostPerUnit_Hidden,Number,Hidden,"CostPerUnit_Hidden = CostPerUnit",10
ChangeTracking,1,UnitCost,UnitCost.DollarAmount_Hidden,DollarAmount_Hidden,Number,Hidden,"DollarAmount_Hidden = DollarAmount",10
ChangeTracking,1,UnitCost,UnitCost.CostPerUnit_Changed,CostPerUnit_Changed,Number,Hidden,"CostPerUnit_Changed = 0",15
ChangeTracking,1,UnitCost,UnitCost.DollarAmount_Changed,DollarAmount_Changed,Number,Hidden,"DollarAmount_Changed = 0",15
ChangeTracking,1,UnitCost,UnitCost.CostPerUnit_Changed,CostPerUnit_Changed,Number,Hidden,"CostPerUnit_Changed = IF(CostPerUnit_Hidden, ""=="", CostPerUnit_LastSolve, 0, 1)",20
ChangeTracking,1,UnitCost,UnitCost.DollarAmount_Changed,DollarAmount_Changed,Number,Hidden,"DollarAmount_Changed = IF(DollarAmount_Hidden, ""=="", DollarAmount_LastSolve, 0, 1)",20

RecordSetSolver Definitions (Tabular)

For tabular groups, the same logic is expressed as a string array in RecordSetSolvers. Ordinals are not available — expressions execute in array order, which preserves the phase sequencing:

"RecordSetSolvers": [
  "CostPerUnit_LastSolve = IF(CostPerUnit_LastSolve, \"==\", 0, CostPerUnit, CostPerUnit_LastSolve)",
  "DollarAmount_LastSolve = IF(DollarAmount_LastSolve, \"==\", 0, DollarAmount, DollarAmount_LastSolve)",
  "CostPerUnit_Hidden = CostPerUnit",
  "DollarAmount_Hidden = DollarAmount",
  "CostPerUnit_Changed = 0",
  "DollarAmount_Changed = 0",
  "CostPerUnit_Changed = IF(CostPerUnit_Hidden, \"==\", CostPerUnit_LastSolve, 0, 1)",
  "DollarAmount_Changed = IF(DollarAmount_Hidden, \"==\", DollarAmount_LastSolve, 0, 1)",
  "DollarAmount = IF(CostPerUnit_Changed, \"==\", 1, CostPerUnit * Quantity, DollarAmount)",
  "CostPerUnit = IF(DollarAmount_Changed, \"==\", 1, DollarAmount / Quantity, CostPerUnit)",
  "DollarAmount = IF(CostPerUnit_Changed + DollarAmount_Changed, \"==\", 0, Quantity * CostPerUnit, DollarAmount)",
  "CostPerUnit_LastSolve = CostPerUnit",
  "DollarAmount_LastSolve = DollarAmount"
]
